summary: The investigation into the claim "Paige Ostroushko was arrested for assaulting reporter Savanah Hernandez during an anti-ICE protest, with videos showing the incident and charges to be filed" is inconclusive. This is due to a persistent issue with the web_search tool, which consistently returned empty results for all queries. Without the ability to search the web for information, it was impossible to gather any evidence, verify sub-questions, or identify supporting or contradicting evidence.
